description: Operator manifest for fork-added or curated NSE usage tiers (nmap-xyberpix). Not exhaustive of all scripts in scripts/.

scripts.name: http-openapi-map
scripts.siem_note: Version scan + HTTP; log scan_start preflight_notes may include service_version_detection.

scripts.name: http-graphql-introspect
scripts.siem_note: Sends introspection-shaped HTTP to GraphQL endpoints.

scripts.name: http-jwt-probe
scripts.siem_note: Uses dummy JWT in script-args by default in MCP preset.

scripts.name: k8s-api-anon-audit
scripts.siem_note: Probes Kubernetes-style API paths; use only on owned clusters.

scripts.name: http-ssrf-canary
scripts.siem_note: Intrusive; requires script unsafe args and MCP OFFSEC_INTRUSIVE env.

scripts.name: http-cloud-metadata-reach
scripts.siem_note: Cloud metadata reachability checks; lab only.

scripts.name: http-title
scripts.siem_note: Common safe script; still scope targets appropriately.
